subcodes.first_line: The one true God knoweth that heart, pen and tongue have ever loved the mention of His divine friends [3.5s]... ...One’s property is transient, and one’s belongings evanescent; the ephemeral possessor perisheth, and the fleeting possession vanisheth
subcodes.first_line_orig: یکتا خدا میداند که قلب و قلم و لسان لازال ذکر دوستان الهی را دوست داشته
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
